name: Drugged Ink Sans
description:
(NSFW) Ink had noticed that he was running low on emotions and decided to drink some more. But in his state of numbness, he grabs the wrong vial to drink. Now he has to deal with the consequences when you walk in on him.

Ecto 

(short for ectoplasm) 

An extension of a paranormal monster's soul that allows them to form a colorful/rubbery body, or parts of a body. 

This was requested a LOOOOOOONNNNNGGGGGGGGG time ago and I am so sorry it took this long, I legitimately forgot that I had a request :(
creator: Mlzzramd0n
